programme.title: ⭐⭐ 2.6m @ 18s OFFSHORE
programme.desc:
Lagide's 2.6m swell with offshore wind might offer a ride or two, assuming you enjoy a bit of a beating.
🌊 Swell: 2.6m @ 18s 💨 Wind: 8.0km/h SSE (OFFSHORE) 💨 Gusts: 13.0km/h 🌊 Wind waves: 0.2m
📋 Clean conditions with offshore wind • Long period - powerful waves

programme.title: ⚠️ 4.2m @ 16s CROSS
programme.desc:
